title: lecythis gracieana
intro: Lecythis gracieana, also known as the Gracie's fruit tree, is a species of tree native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. It is valued for its seeds, which have been traditionally used for their medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to their expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lecythis gracieana seeds include relief from coughs and congestion, improved respiratory function, and enhanced immune system. The seeds can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used in traditional medicine to support respiratory health.
